item.title: Mod
item.description: Rock → Mod Period1958–1967LocationLondon, England (primarily Soho and the West End)GenresBritish rhythm & bluesBeatGarage rockPopFreakbeatPlaylistMODLinksRYM Mod was a youth subculture before it was a musical movement, but the music was always central.
